problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Combining Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
